title: “ธนกร” ย้ำรัฐบาลจำเป็นต้องออก พ.ร.ก.กู้เงิน 4 แสนล้าน แก้วิกฤต ย้อน “เท้ง” เลิกเล่นเกมการเมือง
desc: “ธนกร” ย้ำรัฐบาลจำเป็นต้องออก พ.ร.ก.กู้เงิน 4 แสนล้าน เพื่อพยุงเศรษฐกิจในช่วงวิกฤต ย้อน “เท้ง ณัฐพงษ์” หยุดตีโพยตีพายเลิกเล่นเกมการเมืองบนความเดือดร้อนประชาชนสักครั้ง ไม่ถือว่าเสียศักดิ์ศรี
title_cn: 强调政府需出台40万亿泰铢借款法令应对危机
summary_cn: 政治人士强调泰国经济面临严重危机，政府必须采取紧急措施，包括出台规模达40万亿泰铢的借款皇家法令。他指出当前经济形势严峻，需要政府有力干预。同时呼吁某政治人物停止利用民众困难进行政治游戏，表示这不仅不会丧失尊严，反而是负责任的表现。
desc_original: “ธนกร” ย้ำรัฐบาลจำเป็นต้องออก พ.ร.ก.กู้เงิน 4 แสนล้าน เพื่อพยุงเศรษฐกิจในช่วงวิกฤต ย้อน “เท้ง ณัฐพงษ์” หยุดตีโพยตีพายเลิกเล่นเกมการเมืองบนความเดือดร้อนประชาชนสักครั้ง ไม่ถือว่าเสียศักดิ์ศรี

title: อุตุฯ ฉบับ 4 อัปเดตพายุไต้ฝุ่น "บาหวี่" และฝนตกหนัก เตือนหลายจังหวัดเตรียมรับมือ
desc: กรมอุตุนิยมวิทยา ประกาศฉบับ 4 เตือนจังหวัดคลื่นลมแรงและฝนตกหนัก ส่วนพายุไต้ฝุ่น "บาหวี่" มีแนวโน้มขึ้นฝั่งจีนช่วง 11–12 ก.ค. กระทบไทย ทำให้มรสุมที่พัดปกคลุมมีกำลังแรงขึ้น
title_cn: 气象部门第4号警报：台风「巴威」及暴雨将至，多府应做准备
summary_cn: 泰国气象部门发布第4号天气警报，警告全国多地将面临大浪和暴雨。台风「巴威」预计在7月11日至12日期间在中国上岸，这将导致笼罩泰国的季风系统强度增加。受影响地区应提前做好防灾准备，防范可能的山洪、城市积水等灾害。
desc_original: กรมอุตุนิยมวิทยา ประกาศฉบับ 4 เตือนจังหวัดคลื่นลมแรงและฝนตกหนัก ส่วนพายุไต้ฝุ่น "บาหวี่" มีแนวโน้มขึ้นฝั่งจีนช่วง 11–12 ก.ค. กระทบไทย ทำให้มรสุมที่พัดปกคลุมมีกำลังแรงขึ้น

title: จับตาวันนี้ กก.สรรหา กสทช. ชี้ขาดคุณสมบัติ “หมอสรณ” ปธ.กสทช. ย้ำ กก.สรรหา มีอำนาจชี้ขาดตามกฎหมาย
desc: จับตา 9 โมงเช้า วันนี้ คณะกรรมการสรรหา กสทช. ประชุมชี้ขาดคุณสมบัติ “นพ.สรณ” ปธ.กสทช. “ประพันธ์” อดีต กมธ.ไอซีที วุฒิสภา ย้ำ กรรมการสรรหา กสทช. มีอำนาจชี้ขาดตามกฎหมาย
title_cn: 今日关注：国家广播电信委员会 NBTC 选举小组裁定资格，强调依法有最终决权
summary_cn: 国家广播电信委员会（NBTC）选举小组定于今日上午9点召开会议，就前参议院信息通信技术委员会委员สรณ医生担任 NBTC 主席一职的资格进行最终裁定。委员会主席ประพันธ์重申，选举委员会根据法律条款具有最终决定权，确保选举程序的合法性和权威性。

title: เช็กเส้นทางเลี่ยง "ถนนประชาธิปก" ปิดการจราจร ตั้งแต่แยกบ้านแขกถึงวงเวียนใหญ่
desc: ปภ. ส่ง Cell Broadcast แจ้งเตือน ปิดการจราจร "ถนนประชาธิปก" ตั้งแต่แยกบ้านแขกถึงวงเวียนใหญ่ ซ่อมอุโมงค์รถไฟฟ้า พร้อมเส้นทางเลี่ยง - แนะนำการสัญจร
title_cn: 曼谷「民主路 Prachadipok Road」关闭交通进行轻轨隧道维修，市民需调整路线
summary_cn: 曼谷公共事业部通过手机紧急警报通知市民，「民主路」进行交通关闭，从「民主家别墅路口」至「大环岛」段进行轻轨隧道维修工程。公众部门同时向市民提供替代路线建议，以便车辆能够绕行避免拥堵。驾驶者应事先规划路线，提前出发以应对可能的交通延误。

desc: New YAMAHA YZF-R7 ราคาแนะนำ 345,000 บาท รุ่นพิเศษ 70th Anniversary Edition สี Anniversary White เฉลิมฉลองครบรอบ 70 ปีของยามาฮ่า ในราคาแนะนำ 348,000 บาท + ประกันภัยชั้น 1

summary_cn: 雅马哈推出2026年款新型 YZF-R7 摩托车，建议零售价为345000泰铢，特别推出70周年纪念版本，颜色为周年纪念白，建议零售价348000泰铢，并附赠第一层级保险。该车型融合赛道竞技基因与超级运动特性，定位于中等级跑车市场，是摩托车爱好者的理想选择。

title: แจงงบดีอีปี 70 ถูกตัดเกือบครึ่ง
desc: แจงงบดีอีปี 70 ได้เพิ่ม 33% แต่ถูกตัดเกือบครึ่ง จากที่ขอไป 24,000 ล้านบาท ถูกตัดเหลือ 13,683 ล้านบาท สดช.ได้งบเพิ่ม 92% ส่วน TH AI Passport เฟส 2 มูลค่า 900 ล้านบาท ถูกตัดยกยวง
title_cn: 财政年70预算遭大幅削减 从24000亿降至13683亿泰铢
summary_cn: 泰国政府财政预算请案原定24000亿泰铢，遭国会大幅删减至13683亿泰铢，删幅超过40%。国防部获得92%预算增长，但AI护照第二期（投资900亿泰铢）项目遭冻结，引发外界对国家数字化战略进展的担忧。

title: ล้อมคอก 6 สนามบินสกัดขนยา “พิพัฒน์”สั่งยกมาตรการรักษาความปลอดภัย
desc: “พิพัฒน์” ลงนามคำสั่งตั้งคณะกรรมการยกระดับมาตรฐาน 6 สนามบิน ทอท. หวังคุมเข้มสกัด ขนสินค้า-ยาผิดกฎหมาย พร้อมยกมาตรการรักษาความปลอดภัยสูงขึ้นระดับสากล
title_cn: 总理下令加强6机场安检 严打毒品走私和非法货物
summary_cn: 泰国总理佩特普（Pita）签署指令，成立委员会提升全国6个机场的海关标准，加大对毒品走私和非法货物贸易的打击力度。此举旨在将机场安全措施升级至国际水平，构建更严密的出入境防线，维护国家安全。

title: Nestlé allocates B23bn for new plant
desc: Nestlé has announced a 23-billion-baht investment to build a new Nescafé manufacturing facility in Samut Prakan.
title_cn: 雀巢投资230亿泰铢在沙没巴干府建设Nescafé新厂
summary_cn: 食品巨头雀巢宣布投资230亿泰铢，在沙没巴干府（Samut Prakan）兴建Nescafé咖啡新生产基地。这是雀巢进一步扩大在泰国制造业规模的重大举措，有助提升泰国作为地区食品生产中心的地位。
desc_original: Nestlé has announced a 23-billion-baht investment to build a new Nescafé manufacturing facility in Samut Prakan.

title: ซีพีแจ้งเลิกสัญญาไฮสปีด 3 สนามบิน ปิดมหากาพย์ 8 ปีที่ทำให้คนไทยเสียทั้งเวลาและความหวัง
desc: กลุ่มซีพียื่นหนังสือถึง รฟท.ขอใช้สิทธิ์เลิกสัญญา “ไฮสปีดเทรน” ตามข้อ 6.2 เหตุ รฟท.ไม่สามารถออกหนังสือแจ้งให้เริ่มงาน (Notice to Proceed : NTP) ได้ “อนันต์” ผู้ว่ารถไฟไทย เร่งหาทางออกทุกฝ่าย
title_cn: CP集团宣布终止高铁项目 8年投资生变
summary_cn: 泰国最大企业集团CP通知泰铁公司要求终止「高速列车」项目，理由是泰铁未按期发出项目开工通知（NTP）。该项目已历8年、承载国人期待，如正式终止将成重大基建挫折。泰铁管理层正积极协调各方寻求解决方案。

title: เงินอุดหนุนบุตร เดือนกรกฎาคม 2569 พม. โอนเงิน 600 บาท เข้าบัญชีผู้มีสิทธิแล้ว
desc: "เงินอุดหนุนบุตร" กระทรวงการพัฒนาสังคมและความมั่นคงของมนุษย์ โอนเงิน 600 บาทรอบล่าสุด ให้ผู้มีสิทธิแล้ว ในวันศุกร์ที่ 10 กรกฎาคม 2569
title_cn: 7月儿童补贴发放完毕 每名儿童获600泰铢
summary_cn: 泰国社会发展与人力安全部已于2026年7月10日完成本月儿童补贴发放，符合条件的儿童可获600泰铢补助。该补贴是政府社会保障体系的重要组成部分，旨在减轻低收入家庭的养育负担。
desc_original: "เงินอุดหนุนบุตร" กระทรวงการพัฒนาสังคมและความมั่นคงของมนุษย์ โอนเงิน 600 บาทรอบล่าสุด ให้ผู้มีสิทธิแล้ว ในวันศุกร์ที่ 10 กรกฎาคม 2569

title: “ศุภจี” เคลียร์ดราม่า “หายไปไหน” เปิดใจ! ติดการทำงานแบบคนเบื้องหลังจนสื่อสารน้อย
desc: “ศุภจี” เคลียร์ดราม่า “ศุภจี หายไปไหน” ชี้ติดรูปแบบคนทำงานเบื้องหลัง ต่อไปพร้อมสวมหมวก “นักการเมือง” เดินหน้าสื่อสารมากขึ้น กางผลงานผ่าวิกฤตปากท้อง ดันราคาทุเรียน มะพร้าว กุ้ง และข้าวพุ่ง
title_cn: 官员ศุภจี澄清舆论 承诺加强沟通
summary_cn: 泰国某官员ศุภจี澄清了近期网络关于他「消失」的舆论，解释为自身工作方式长期偏向后台低调，未来将以更加公开的政治家身份增加公众沟通频率。他同时展示了在度过粮食成本危机期间的政治成绩，包括成功推高榴莲、椰子、虾和大米等主要农产品的国际出口价格，为泰国农业和经济增长做贡献。
desc_original: “ศุภจี” เคลียร์ดราม่า “ศุภจี หายไปไหน” ชี้ติดรูปแบบคนทำงานเบื้องหลัง ต่อไปพร้อมสวมหมวก “นักการเมือง” เดินหน้าสื่อสารมากขึ้น กางผลงานผ่าวิกฤตปากท้อง ดันราคาทุเรียน มะพร้าว กุ้ง และข้าวพุ่ง

title: Consumers upbeat, businesses cautious
desc: Consumer confidence rebounded for the first time in four months in June, supported by falling oil prices and the implementation of the "Thai Chuay Thai Plus" (Thais Help Thais) co-payment scheme, according to the University of the Thai Chamber of Commerce (UTCC).
title_cn: 消费者信心反弹 企业保持谨慎
summary_cn: 泰国消费者信心在6月时环比首次反弹，主要动力来自国际油价回落和政府「泰国人帮泰国人增强版」（Thai Chuay Thai Plus）医疗共付计划的落地实施。此数据展示消费端对经济前景恢复乐观，但与此同时企业部门仍然保持谨慎态度，说明对中期经济前景的评估存在分化。
desc_original: Consumer confidence rebounded for the first time in four months in June, supported by falling oil prices and the implementation of the "Thai Chuay Thai Plus" (Thais Help Thais) co-payment scheme, according to the University of the Thai Chamber of Commerce (UTCC).

title: AI adoption helps Thai firms become digitally mature
desc: Thai businesses recorded a medium level of digital maturity for the first time as artificial intelligence (AI) adoption accelerates, according to the Thailand Digital Outlook 2026 survey.
title_cn: AI赋能泰企 数字成熟度首达中等水平
summary_cn: 根据《泰国数字前景2026》最新调查，随着人工智能技术采纳加速推进，泰国企业数字化成熟度首次达到中等水平里程碑。这一进展反映了泰国企业在数字转型过程中所取得的实质性突破，也表明人工智能正逐步成为提升企业竞争力、推动经济转型升级的关键驱动因素。
desc_original: Thai businesses recorded a medium level of digital maturity for the first time as artificial intelligence (AI) adoption accelerates, according to the Thailand Digital Outlook 2026 survey.

title: Ex-minister in hot  water over road bid
desc: The National Anti-Corruption Commission (NACC) has found sufficient grounds to pursue charges against former deputy interior minister Krieng Kaltinan, members of his family, former municipal officials and business associates over allegations they split 43.2 million baht in road construction contracts to circumvent competitive bidding.
title_cn: 前副部长因道路招标贪污被控
summary_cn: 泰国国家反腐委员会发现充分证据，决定起诉前副内政部长Krieng Kaltinan及其家族成员、前市政官员和商业伙伴。被控人士被指控将总额4320万泰铢的道路建筑合同进行分割，以规避政府竞争性招标程序。这宗案件涉及重大腐败嫌疑，反映出泰国公共采购领域的廉政建设任重道远。
desc_original: The National Anti-Corruption Commission (NACC) has found sufficient grounds to pursue charges against former deputy interior minister Krieng Kaltinan, members of his family, former municipal officials and business associates over allegations they split 43.2 million baht in road construction contracts to circumvent competitive bidding.

title: Chadchart sets out work plan
desc: Bangkok Governor Chadchart Sittipunt has pledged to launch a 100-day programme focused on tackling air pollution, flooding and transparency while implementing his 261 campaign policies.
title_cn: 曼谷市长公布百日工作方案
summary_cn: 曼谷市长Chadchart Sittipunt公布了新任期内的首批百日工作方案，将重点关注困扰曼谷市民的三大核心问题：空气污染、洪涝灾害防控和政府工作透明度提升。同时他承诺逐步落实261项竞选承诺。这些举措直接关乎曼谷市民的生活质量和城市长期发展。
desc_original: Bangkok Governor Chadchart Sittipunt has pledged to launch a 100-day programme focused on tackling air pollution, flooding and transparency while implementing his 261 campaign policies.

title: IMF raises Thai GDP growth forecast
desc: The International Monetary Fund (IMF) has upgraded Thailand's GDP growth forecast to 1.9% from 1.5%, supported by the government's stimulus measures.
title_cn: 国际货币基金组织上调泰国GDP增长预测
summary_cn: 国际货币基金组织（IMF）将泰国今年经济增长预测从1.5%上调至1.9%，主要受政府刺激措施支撑。这一升幅反映国际社会对泰国经济前景的信心增强，有望促进外资流入和国内消费增长，为长期发展奠定基础。
desc_original: The International Monetary Fund (IMF) has upgraded Thailand's GDP growth forecast to 1.9% from 1.5%, supported by the government's stimulus measures.

title: SEC expands self-reporting probe
desc: The Securities and Exchange Commission (SEC) is widening its investigation into whether false information reports linked to Supaporn Phimpong were intentionally submitted to the electronic reporting system, which is a violation of securities law.
title_cn: 证监会扩大虚假信息举报调查范围
summary_cn: 泰国证券交易委员会（SEC）扩大对虚假信息举报的调查，重点查证苏帕蓬·平蓬（Supaporn Phimpong）是否故意向电子报告系统提交虚假信息并违反证券法规定。相关部门将推进后续执法程序，以维护市场秩序和投资者权益。
desc_original: The Securities and Exchange Commission (SEC) is widening its investigation into whether false information reports linked to Supaporn Phimpong were intentionally submitted to the electronic reporting system, which is a violation of securities law.

title: Mae Hong Son abbot defrocked after heroin found in quarters
desc: Mae Hong Son abbot defrocked after heroin found in quarters Legacy Police arrested and defrocked the abbot of a well-known temple in Pang Mapha district, Mae Hong Son province, today, July 9, after allegedly finding heroin hidden in his living quarters. The search followed numerous complaints from residents, who had raised concerns about the abbot’s behaviour and suspected that he might be involved in illegal drug activity . Details of the arrest were shared on the Pang Mapha Police Station Facebook page following an operation involving local investigators, Border Patrol Police Company 336, Pang Mapha district officials, and soldiers from Infantry Company 722. Photo via Chiang Mai News The joint team surrounded the temple before officers entered the abbot’s quarters to conduct a search. Inside, they allegedly found an unspecified quantity of heroin concealed in the quarters. Heroin is classified as a Category 1 narcotic under Thai law. The substance was seized as evidence, while the abbot was taken into custody for initial questioning. Officials later arranged for him to leave the monkhood before transferring him and the seized evidence to investigators at Pang Mapha Police Station
title_cn: 湄洪顺府住持因房间内查获海洛因被逐出僧籍
summary_cn: 泰国湄洪顺府庞马发县一著名寺庙住持因房间内发现海洛因被捕并逐出僧籍。警方在收到居民多起投诉后，联合边防巡逻队等部门搜查该住持房间，缴获数量不详的第一类毒品海洛因，现已将其移交警方调查。

title_cn: 曼谷商业建筑沉降监测中 相关部门加强应急准备
summary_cn: 曼谷商业建筑受紫线南延轻轨地下隧道渗水影响，相关部门负责人表示该建筑暂无继续沉降迹象。部门已派遣特种救援队和监测设备进场，若发现建筑进一步倾斜将立即启动应急预案，确保周边公众和建筑安全。

title: 16 arrests made in fake birth registration case
desc: Sixteen people, including district officials and hospital staff, have been arrested in connection with a fraudulent birth registration scheme, Thai authorities said on Thursday.
title_cn: 虚假出生证件案牵连16人被捕
summary_cn: 泰国当局逮捕16名涉嫌虚假出生证件欺诈的嫌疑人，其中包括地方官员和医院工作人员。该案件暴露出政府机构内的腐败问题，多部门工作人员涉嫌串谋伪造出生登记，严重危害社会信任和公众利益。
desc_original: Sixteen people, including district officials and hospital staff, have been arrested in connection with a fraudulent birth registration scheme, Thai authorities said on Thursday.

title: Water leaks into under-construction Bangkok subway tunnel
desc: Water has leaked into the Purple Line subway tunnel under construction beneath the Wong Wian Yai intersection in Thon Buri district of Bangkok, where crews were working on Thursday to ensure the safety of adjacent buildings.
title_cn: 曼谷紫线地铁隧道施工现场渗水
summary_cn: 曼谷吞武里区王炎艺（Wong Wian Yai）交叉口下方正在施工的紫线地铁隧道发生渗水。工程人员周四在施工现场进行抢修，同时采取措施确保相邻建筑的安全。
desc_original: Water has leaked into the Purple Line subway tunnel under construction beneath the Wong Wian Yai intersection in Thon Buri district of Bangkok, where crews were working on Thursday to ensure the safety of adjacent buildings.

title: Exit the dragon: Huai Khwang police told to drop logo
desc: Bangkok police have ordered the Huai Khwang police station to scrap the dragon symbol used to represent the station, but brushed aside speculation by online pundits that the logo reflected the influence of “grey Chinese investors”.
title_cn: 怀卡警察局被勒令撤销龙形标志
summary_cn: 曼谷警察总局下令怀卡（Huai Khwang）警察局撤销该警局的龙形标志。警方否认了网络舆论关于该标志反映「灰色中资」影响的猜测。
desc_original: Bangkok police have ordered the Huai Khwang police station to scrap the dragon symbol used to represent the station, but brushed aside speculation by online pundits that the logo reflected the influence of “grey Chinese investors”.

title: Two Lao men wanted in ‘Meena’ heroin case
desc: The Office of the Narcotics Control Board (ONCB) has sought warrants for the arrest of two Lao men suspected of using Thais, including a flight attendant arrested recently in Australia, to smuggle heroin to third countries.
title_cn: 「美娜」毒品案中两名老挝男子被通缉
summary_cn: 泰国禁毒委员会（ONCB）已申请逮捕令追捕两名老挝男子，他们涉嫌指使泰国人（包括一名最近在澳大利亚被捕的空乘）走私海洛因至第三国。此案涉及跨国贩毒网络。
desc_original: The Office of the Narcotics Control Board (ONCB) has sought warrants for the arrest of two Lao men suspected of using Thais, including a flight attendant arrested recently in Australia, to smuggle heroin to third countries.

summary_cn: ภ.ง.ด.94表单是泰国的半年个人所得税申报表。许多人误以为仅企业主需要提交，实际上有额外收入的工薪族也必须申报。这是工薪阶层容易忽视的税务义务。

title: Thai and Malaysian leaders resolve fisheries dispute
desc: KUALA LUMPUR - The leaders of ​Malaysia and Thailand said on Thursday that they had resolved an issue that had disrupted trade in seafood, and that they would work on ​developing a special border economic ‌zone.
title_cn: 泰马领导人解决渔业贸易纠纷
summary_cn: 泰国和马来西亚领导人周四宣布已解决影响海产品贸易的长期纠纷。双方承诺将合作开发边境特殊经济区，促进地区经济整合与贸易往来。
desc_original: KUALA LUMPUR - The leaders of ​Malaysia and Thailand said on Thursday that they had resolved an issue that had disrupted trade in seafood, and that they would work on ​developing a special border economic ‌zone.

title: Four Indians held on wildlife trafficking charges
desc: Four Indian nationals are being held on charges of trying to smuggle protected wildlife out of Thailand after police seized 100 Indian star tortoises, a gibbon and a langur at a house in Bang Khunthian district of Bangkok.
title_cn: 四名印度人因野生动物走私被捕
summary_cn: 曼谷邦坤田地区警方在民宅查获100只印度星龟、1只长臂猿和1只叶猴，四名印度籍人士因涉嫌走私受保护野生动物出境被控制。此案反映泰国作为野生动物贩运中转地的现状。
desc_original: Four Indian nationals are being held on charges of trying to smuggle protected wildlife out of Thailand after police seized 100 Indian star tortoises, a gibbon and a langur at a house in Bang Khunthian district of Bangkok.

title_cn: 苏帕普案更正：证券交易委员会删除披露数据
summary_cn: 泰国证券交易委员会发现苏帕普（Suphaporn Pimpong）相关的246-2表单披露数据存在严重错误，已从系统删除。委员会确认相关人士身份真实，调查继续进行中，一旦证实违法将启动诉讼程序。

title: Court upholds B400-billion borrowing decree
desc: The Constitutional Court ruled on Thursday that the government’s ​400-billion-baht emergency loan ‌decree was lawful, lifting uncertainty over state spending plans.
title_cn: 法院裁定4000亿泰铢紧急贷款令合法有效
summary_cn: 泰国宪法法院裁定政府4000亿泰铢紧急贷款令符合法律规定。该裁决消除市场对政府支出计划的不确定性，为国家财政规划扫清法律障碍。
desc_original: The Constitutional Court ruled on Thursday that the government’s ​400-billion-baht emergency loan ‌decree was lawful, lifting uncertainty over state spending plans.

title: Red Bull family Thailand’s richest for third straight year
desc: The Yoovidhya family of Red Bull fame have retained the top spot as the richest in Thailand for the third consecutive year with a net worth of $47 billion, followed by the CP Group’s Chearavanont brothers with $36.6 billion, according to Forbes magazine.
title_cn: 红牛家族蝉联泰国首富，连续三年领跑
summary_cn: 根据Forbes杂志数据，尤维迪亚家族（Yoovidhya）凭红牛品牌连续第三年蝉联泰国首富，净资产达470亿美元。正大集团的差瓦农特兄弟（Chearavanont）以366亿美元排名第二，反映泰国财富格局中家族企业的主导地位。
desc_original: The Yoovidhya family of Red Bull fame have retained the top spot as the richest in Thailand for the third consecutive year with a net worth of $47 billion, followed by the CP Group’s Chearavanont brothers with $36.6 billion, according to Forbes magazine.

title: Thai mother suspects hazardous substances in orange juice after child’s allergic reaction
desc: Thai mother suspects hazardous substances in orange juice after child’s allergic reaction Legacy A Thai mother urged the public to exercise caution after her child was admitted to hospital following an allergic reaction after drinking orange juice purchased from a street vendor . The mother shared her account through the Facebook page Drama Addict today, July 9, saying her child developed widespread itchy rashes shortly after consuming the drink. According to the mother, the child was taken to hospital and later recovered. She said she decided to share the incident because her child had previously consumed orange juice from street vendors without experiencing any similar reaction. The mother said medical staff suggested the reaction could have been triggered by an unidentified substance in the drink. However, no official confirmation has been made regarding the cause of the allergy. summary_cn: 泰国投资委员会批准了价值约19.9亿美元的新投资项目，由雀巢（Nestle）和泰国国际航空公司（Thai Airways International）等领头。这一批准展示了泰国在吸引外资方面的持续努力，有利于推动该国经济增长和产业发展。

Rattikarn “Praew” Amloy, better known by her stage name Nene Royal , has built a reputation as a street performer in Phuket . She regularly performs with her band, Ozone, at Naka Night Market, where the group plays rock music for both Thai and international visitors. title: Thailand Malaysia cooperation advances during Anutin visit
desc: Thailand Malaysia cooperation advances during Anutin visit Legacy Thailand and Malaysia agreed to strengthen cooperation on border security , transport connectivity, trade and economic development during Prime Minister Anutin Charnvirakul’s official visit to Malaysia today, July 9. Deputy Prime Minister and Foreign Affairs Minister Sihasak Phuangketkeow attended a bilateral meeting between Prime Minister Anutin and Malaysian Prime Minister Dato’ Seri Anwar Ibrahim during the visit. Sihasak joined a small-group meeting in which the two prime ministers reaffirmed their commitment to expanding cooperation in areas that benefit the people of both countries. The discussions focused particularly on security and development in Thailand’s southern border provinces and Malaysia’s northern states through improved transport connectivity, increased trade and economic development in border areas. title_cn: Atta与台北观光局合作推介泰国旅游
summary_cn: Atta与泰国观光局联手推动台湾市场开拓，促进双向旅游发展。台北观光局2026年目标是吸引100万台湾游客赴泰国旅游。Atta的长期计划更加雄心勃勃，期望在3年内吸引200万至300万台湾游客。此项合作通过路演等推介活动向台湾旅客介绍泰国旅游资源，旨在深化泰台旅游联系和经济往来。

title: Mama pioneer Pipat Paniangvait dies peacefully aged 87
desc: Mama pioneer Pipat Paniangvait dies peacefully aged 87 Legacy Pipat Paniangvait , chairman and executive chairman of Thai President Foods Public Company Limited, the producer of Mama instant noodles , has died peacefully at the age of 87 . His son shared the funeral schedule on his Facebook page today, July 9, and posted a message to his father. “There’s nothing to worry about, Dad. We siblings will stay united and look after one another. Rest peacefully. You don’t have to work hard anymore.” The Paniangvait family announced that Buddhist funeral prayers and the cremation ceremony would be held at the Klang Nam Pavilion at Wat Thepsirin in Bangkok. Social media users posted messages expressing their condolences following the death of the businessman, who played a major role in developing Mama into one of Thailand’s best-known instant noodle brands. Photo via Thairath Pipat was born in Bangkok on July 4, 1939. He was a senior executive within the Saha Group and was widely known for his role in developing the Mama instant noodle business. title_cn: 泰国方便面Mama创始人皮帕特逝世，享年87岁
summary_cn: 泰国著名方便面品牌Mama创始人兼董事长皮帕特·帕尼安瓦特（Pipat Paniangvait）于7月9日平静地辞世，享年87岁。他1939年生于曼谷，1966年开始职业生涯，曾任狮子牙膏公司销售促进主管。皮帕特一生致力于将Mama打造成泰国乃至国际知名品牌，对泰国食品工业发展做出重大贡献。他的去世引发泰国社交媒体广泛悼念。

title: 突发！泰国拉玛二路发生打桩机倾倒事故，致1人死亡
desc: 泰国头条新闻社讯 7月9日，泰国曼谷拉玛二路出城方向靠近空銮桥（Khlong Luang Bridge）掉头处（位于北榄府辖区）发生一起施工安全事故。一台正在作业的打桩机突发倾倒，砸中现场一名工人，导致其当场死亡。 接到报警后，北榄府直辖县Bang Torat 警察局迅速派出警力，联合救援人员及相关部门赶赴事发地点，立即展开现场勘查、证据收集及事故原因调查工作。目前，相关部门正对事故具体情况作进一步核实。 为尽快恢复交通秩序，有关部门已协调专业力量对倾倒的打桩机进行切割拆除和清理作业。受事故影响，事发路段附近区域临时实施交通管制，以便于救援和清理工作顺利推进。目前，拉玛二路出城方向该路段交通拥堵严重，车辆通行缓慢。 针对当前交通状况，有关部门提醒广大民众，请尽量避开事故路段，合理规划出行路线。如确需途经该区域，请务必提高警惕，减速慢行，严格遵守交通指引，并持续关注官方发布的实时交通信息，确保自身出行安全与顺畅。 （编译：Wan；来源：Thairhat、Khaosod） The post 突发！泰国拉玛二路发生打桩机倾倒事故，致1人死亡 appeared first on 泰国头条新闻 .

title: House approves Hotel Act updates in principle
desc: The House of Representatives on Wednesday unanimously approved in principle two bills to amend the Hotel Act, despite opposition criticism they would not adequately address long-standing regulatory problems.
title_cn: 泰国议会原则上批准《酒店法》修订案
summary_cn: 泰国国会众议院于7月9日一致原则上批准两项修订《酒店法》的法案。修订内容旨在现代化酒店业的监管框架，但反对派批评指出，这些修订措施未能充分解决长期存在的监管问题。此次通过预计将推动泰国酒店业的相关制度改革和规范化建设。
desc_original: The House of Representatives on Wednesday unanimously approved in principle two bills to amend the Hotel Act, despite opposition criticism they would not adequately address long-standing regulatory problems.

title: 2 Russians held with over 5.4m baht from mule accounts
desc: 2 Russians held with over 5.4m baht from mule accounts Legacy Police arrested two Russian nationals during raids at three locations in Phuket on Tuesday, July 8, seizing more than 5.4 million baht as part of an investigation into mule accounts linked to call centre scams . The operation followed information from the Anti-Cyber Scam Centre, which alerted officers from Provincial Police Region 8 and Phuket Provincial Police to suspicious activity involving Russian nationals repeatedly withdrawing large amounts of cash from ATMs across the province. According to investigators, banks later confirmed that the withdrawals were made from mule accounts that had received transfers from victims of call centre scams. Police reviewed CCTV footage, examined financial records and gathered evidence before carrying out searches at three properties in Phuket. Photo via Facebook/ อสมท ภูเก็ต At the first location in Wichit subdistrict, officers arrested 26 year old Russian national, Ilya. Police seized 638,700 baht in cash during the search. At the second property, officers arrested another Russian national, Egor. Authorities confiscated more than 4.8 million baht in cash, including 4.5 million baht
title_cn: 普吉岛警方逮捕2名俄罗斯人，缴获540多万泰铢骡帐户资金
summary_cn: 普吉岛警方于7月8日在反网络诈骗中心的提示下，对3处房产进行搜查，逮捕2名俄罗斯国民（26岁的伊利亚和埃戈尔），缴获540多万泰铢现金。调查发现，这些资金来自电话诈骗中心受害者转账的骡帐户。警方通过审查监控录像和金融记录确认违法行为，此案涉及大规模跨国电信诈骗犯罪。

title: BoT: Headline inflation likely below projection
desc: Thailand's headline inflation is likely to be lower than projected this year as global oil prices decline, says the regulator.
title_cn: 泰国央行预测：今年通胀或低于预期
summary_cn: 泰国中央银行（BoT）预测，由于全球油价下跌，泰国今年的整体通胀率将低于年初预测。这一预测反映了国际能源市场波动对泰国物价水平的积极影响。央行的前瞻性预判为出口商和消费者提供了相对利好的经济前景。
desc_original: Thailand's headline inflation is likely to be lower than projected this year as global oil prices decline, says the regulator.

title: 2 Indians arrested, over 200 animals rescued during Bangkok wildlife trafficking crackdown
desc: 2 Indians arrested, over 200 animals rescued during Bangkok wildlife trafficking crackdown Legacy Police arrested two Indian nationals at two rented houses in Bangkok on Tuesday, July 7, and rescued more than 200 protected animals from wildlife trafficking . Officers from the Wildlife Crime Intelligence Center (WWC) and the Natural Resources and Environmental Crime Suppression Division searched properties in Thung Khru and Bang Khun Thian districts following an investigation linked to an animal seizure in India on April 24. In the earlier case, authorities recovered 366 animals, including iguanas, Asian leaf tortoises, leopard tortoises and freshwater crocodiles, before returning them to Thailand. Thai investigators subsequently expanded the inquiry, leading officers to the two properties in Bangkok. title: Israeli tourist arrivals in Thailand forecast to exceed 442,530
desc: Israeli tourist arrivals in Thailand forecast to exceed 442,530 Legacy The Tourism Authority of Thailand (TAT) met Israeli diplomatic representatives in Bangkok on July 6 to discuss attracting more high-spending Israeli tourists to Thailand under its “Value over Volume” tourism strategy ahead of the coming travel season . TAT Governor Thapanee Kiatphaibool and Executive Director for Europe Suladda Sarutilavan welcomed Israeli Ambassador to Thailand Dr Alona Fisher-Kamm and Israeli Minister and Head of Consular Affairs Eli Sneh. The meeting was held as part of Dr Fisher-Kamm’s introductory visit following her appointment to the position. Representatives discussed opportunities to strengthen tourism cooperation between Israel and Thailand, with a focus on encouraging travel by visitors from the Israeli market. TAT and the Embassy of Israel in Thailand expressed their willingness to cooperate on several tourism initiatives. These included efforts to encourage additional direct flights between Israel and Thailand. title_cn: 以色列游客赴泰人数有望突破44.2万
summary_cn: 泰国旅游局与以色列驻泰大使及领事官员于7月6日在曼谷举行会议，讨论在「以质量为先」战略下吸引更多高消费以色列游客。预计今年以色列游客赴泰人数将超过44.2万人次。双方表示有意增加以色列与泰国之间的直飞航班，目前由EL AL和Arkia两家航空公司经营往返曼谷和普吉岛的航线。此次合作旨在深化双方旅游业的合作关系。

title: 阿努廷出访马来西亚，深化两国合作造福民众
desc: 泰国头条新闻社讯 7月9日11点20分（马来西亚吉隆坡时间），泰国总理府办公室发言人拉差妲透露，总理兼内政部部长阿努廷率团抵达吉隆坡国际机场，正式对马来西亚展开访问。马来西亚总理安瓦尔亲自到机场迎接，随行人员包括马来西亚高级代表和泰国驻吉隆坡大使馆的工作人员等。之后，双方一起出席了在吉隆坡国际机场贵宾楼举行的欢迎仪式，并共同检阅了仪仗队。安瓦尔还邀请阿努廷同乘一辆车，前往位于布城的马来西亚总理府，参加正式欢迎仪式和会谈。 拉差妲表示，马来西亚这次热情的接待体现了两国领导人之间的密切关系和互相信任，是推动双方合作取得实质成果、更加惠及民众的重要基础。泰国政府重视与邻国建立良好关系，以借机转化为经济机遇和提高民众生活质量，为此，本次会谈的重点包括扩大贸易、投资、物流与交通连接、强化农业、旅游及边境地区合作等，旨在帮助泰国企业家、农民、出口商和劳工更好地进入马来西亚与区域市场，创造收入和就业机会，提升国家竞争力。 此外，双方还将讨论安全合作、打击跨国犯罪、人口贩卖、网络诈骗，以及东盟框架下的协作等内容，以加强地区安全、信心和稳定，为贸易、投资和旅游提供重要保障。今天下午，阿努廷还将与安瓦尔举行双边会谈以及参加全体会谈，就潜力合作领域交换意见，并见证农业合作谅解备忘录（MOU）的签署和会见媒体。 据悉，安瓦尔特别设置了午宴款待阿努廷及泰国代表团。今天傍晚时分，阿努廷将与在马的泰国企业代表会面，听取他们的意见并促进泰国在马来西亚的贸易、投资和业务拓展。泰国政府希望泰马之间的良好关系能切实造福两国人民，包括增加贸易、投资、旅游机会、创造就业，以及提高民众的生活质量等，同时，共同推动东盟共同体更加强大、稳定和可持续发展。 （编译：KA；来源：fm91bkk） The post 阿努廷出访马来西亚，深化两国合作造福民众 appeared first on 泰国头条新闻 .
title_cn: 阿努廷出访马来西亚，深化两国合作造福民众
summary_cn: 泰国总理阿努廷率团访问马来西亚，马来西亚总理安瓦尔亲自迎接。双方将重点讨论扩大贸易、投资、物流与交通连接、农业、旅游及边境合作，帮助泰国企业、农民和劳工进入马来西亚及区域市场。此外还将讨论安全合作、打击跨境犯罪、人口贩卖和网络诈骗等。此次访问体现了两国领导人的密切关系，旨在为两国人民带来实质经济利益和生活质量提升。
desc_original: 泰国头条新闻社讯 7月9日11点20分（马来西亚吉隆坡时间），泰国总理府办公室发言人拉差妲透露，总理兼内政部部长阿努廷率团抵达吉隆坡国际机场，正式对马来西亚展开访问。马来西亚总理安瓦尔亲自到机场迎接，随行人员包括马来西亚高级代表和泰国驻吉隆坡大使馆的工作人员等。之后，双方一起出席了在吉隆坡国际机场贵宾楼举行的欢迎仪式，并共同检阅了仪仗队。安瓦尔还邀请阿努廷同乘一辆车，前往位于布城的马来西亚总理府，参加正式欢迎仪式和会谈。 拉差妲表示，马来西亚这次热情的接待体现了两国领导人之间的密切关系和互相信任，是推动双方合作取得实质成果、更加惠及民众的重要基础。泰国政府重视与邻国建立良好关系，以借机转化为经济机遇和提高民众生活质量，为此，本次会谈的重点包括扩大贸易、投资、物流与交通连接、强化农业、旅游及边境地区合作等，旨在帮助泰国企业家、农民、出口商和劳工更好地进入马来西亚与区域市场，创造收入和就业机会，提升国家竞争力。 此外，双方还将讨论安全合作、打击跨国犯罪、人口贩卖、网络诈骗，以及东盟框架下的协作等内容，以加强地区安全、信心和稳定，为贸易、投资和旅游提供重要保障。今天下午，阿努廷还将与安瓦尔举行双边会谈以及参加全体会谈，就潜力合作领域交换意见，并见证农业合作谅解备忘录（MOU）的签署和会见媒体。 据悉，安瓦尔特别设置了午宴款待阿努廷及泰国代表团。今天傍晚时分，阿努廷将与在马的泰国企业代表会面，听取他们的意见并促进泰国在马来西亚的贸易、投资和业务拓展。泰国政府希望泰马之间的良好关系能切实造福两国人民，包括增加贸易、投资、旅游机会、创造就业，以及提高民众的生活质量等，同时，共同推动东盟共同体更加强大、稳定和可持续发展。 （编译：KA；来源：fm91bkk） The post 阿努廷出访马来西亚，深化两国合作造福民众 appeared first on 泰国头条新闻 .
